comments.body:
## [Codecov](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/pull/2846?dropdown=coverage&src=pr&el=h1&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py) Report
:white_check_mark: All modified and coverable lines are covered by tests.
:white_check_mark: Project coverage is 90.39%. Comparing base ([`6dd4531`](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/commit/6dd4531f1d1ac8de5b208ae744c260d5fa1fc025?dropdown=coverage&el=desc&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py)) to head ([`7fef895`](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/commit/7fef895ac6d179f1978ab8464e559b176b322da4?dropdown=coverage&el=desc&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py)).
:warning: Report is 84 commits behind head on master.

<details><summary>Additional details and impacted files</summary>



```diff
@@           Coverage Diff           @@
##           master    #2846   +/-   ##
=======================================
  Coverage   90.39%   90.39%           
=======================================
  Files          16       16           
  Lines        2509     2509           
=======================================
  Hits         2268     2268           
  Misses        241      241           
```
</details>

[:umbrella: View full report in Codecov by Harness](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/pull/2846?dropdown=coverage&src=pr&el=continue&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py).   
:loudspeaker: Have feedback on the report? [Share it here](https://about.codecov.io/codecov-pr-comment-feedback/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py).

- :snowflake: [Test Analytics](https://docs.codecov.com/docs/test-analytics): Detect flaky tests, report on failures, and find test suite problems.
